title: glandularia tristachya
intro: Glandularia tristachya, also known as Rock Verbena, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its small, pink, purple, or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Glandularia tristachya include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rock Verbena include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Glandularia tristachya can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
